exampleSentences.sentence: We have a meeting on Monday.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: हमारी सोमवार को एक बैठक है।

exampleSentences.sentence: I go to the gym on Tuesday.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: मैं मंगलवार को जिम जाता हूँ।

exampleSentences.sentence: She has a class on Wednesday.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: उसकी बुधवार को एक क्लास है।

exampleSentences.sentence: The new movie releases on Thursday.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: નવી ફિલ્મ ગુરુવારે રિલીઝ થાય છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: नई फिल्म गुरुवार को रिलीज हो रही है।

exampleSentences.sentence: Let's go out for dinner on Friday.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: ચાલો શુક્રવારે રાત્રિભોજન માટે બહાર જઈએ.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: चलो शुक्रवार को रात के खाने के लिए बाहर चलते हैं।
